title: India Stock Fundamentals Scraper
description: Get Indian stock prices, ratios, financial statements, and shareholding data. No login or API key required.

symbols.title: NSE symbols or BSE codes
symbols.description: Examples: RELIANCE, TCS, INFY, HDFCBANK, or 500325.

source.title: Data source
source.description: Use Screener.in, Moneycontrol, or merge both into one record per stock.

consolidated.title: Use consolidated financials
consolidated.description: Use consolidated Screener.in results when available.

includeFinancials.title: Include quarterly and annual results
includeFinancials.description: Adds the latest four quarters and five annual periods from Screener.in.

includeShareholding.title: Include shareholding pattern
includeShareholding.description: Adds the latest promoter, FII, DII, and public holdings from Screener.in.

maxResults.title: Maximum stocks
maxResults.description: Limits the number of unique symbols processed in one run.

maxConcurrency.title: Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of stocks processed at the same time. Keep this modest to avoid rate limits.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy settings. Datacenter or no proxy usually works; residential proxy can improve reliability at scale.
